title: gnames: A fast scientific name verification service
description: GNames provides accurate and fast verification of scientific names in unlimited quantities. It supports exact and fuzzy matching of input strings to scientific names aggregated from a large number of biodiversity data-sources, returning matched names, synonyms, taxonomic status, classification, and vernacular names. It also supports a Reconciliation API for integration with tools like OpenRefine.

creators.name: Mozzherin, Dmitry
creators.affiliation: Species File Group, University of Illinois
